Meet Our Founder

Dr. Konalla
Muralikrishna

BPT, MPT · Founder & Chief Physiotherapist

Dr. Muralikrishna founded Loukya with one vision — to make world-class physiotherapy accessible to every patient. His patient-first approach and specialist expertise have helped hundreds regain their freedom of movement.

Neurological & Orthopaedic Physiotherapy Specialist
Expert in Acupuncture & Traditional Cup Therapy
Chiropractic & Sports Injury Specialist
Pediatric & Paralysis Rehabilitation Expert
Qualifications & Certifications
BPT & MPT (Orthopaedic Physiotherapy & Acupuncture) — Dr. NTRUHS
15+ Years Experience in Physiotherapy & Pain Management
Lifetime Member — Indian Association of Physiotherapy (I.A.P)
Lifetime Member — Telangana Acupuncture & Acupressure Practitioner Association (TAAPA)
Certificate in Concepts of Taping & Clinical Practice (2018) — Taping Foundation of India
PG Diploma in Diagnosis & Rehabilitation of Traditional Chinese Medicine (2018) — Changchun University
Certificate in Manual Osteopathic & Chiropractic — Global Academy of Manual Osteopathy India (GAMO) (2019)
Certificate in Master Tung Acupuncture (2019) — Spine Care

Our Story

Dedicated to Your
Recovery

Loukya Pain Management Clinic was founded with a single mission: to provide world-class physiotherapy that is accessible to everyone. Located in the heart of Nagole, Hyderabad, we have grown to become the area's most trusted rehabilitation center.

Under the expert guidance of Dr. Konalla Muralikrishna, our clinic combines modern physiotherapy techniques with time-tested traditional methods to deliver results that speak for themselves — as evidenced by our 500+ five-star Google reviews.

✓
Patient-first approach to every treatment
✓
Modern equipment & traditional techniques combined
✓
Affordable pricing for premium care
✓
Personalized recovery plans for each patient
"Our goal is simple — to help every patient live a pain-free life with dignity and independence."
Dr. Konalla
Muralikrishna
Founder & Chief Physiotherapist
Meet Our Founder

Dr. Konalla
Muralikrishna

BPT, MPT · Founder & Chief Physiotherapist

Dr. Muralikrishna completed his Bachelor of Physiotherapy from Dr. NTRUHS and his Master's in Orthopaedic Physiotherapy and Acupuncture from Dr. NTRUHS. He has over 15 years of experience in physiotherapy and pain management and has completed numerous certificate courses in countries like Singapore and Malaysia.

Neurological & Orthopaedic Physiotherapy Specialist
Expert in Acupuncture & Traditional Cup Therapy
Chiropractic & Sports Injury Specialist
Pediatric & Paralysis Rehabilitation Expert
Qualifications & Certifications
BPT & MPT (Orthopaedic Physiotherapy & Acupuncture) — Dr. NTRUHS
15+ Years Experience in Physiotherapy & Pain Management
Lifetime Member — Indian Association of Physiotherapy (I.A.P)
Lifetime Member — Telangana Acupuncture & Acupressure Practitioner Association (TAAPA)
Certificate in Concepts of Taping & Clinical Practice (2018) — Taping Foundation of India
PG Diploma in Diagnosis & Rehabilitation of Traditional Chinese Medicine (2018) — Changchun University
Certificate in Manual Osteopathic & Chiropractic — Global Academy of Manual Osteopathy India (GAMO) (2019)
Certificate in Master Tung Acupuncture (2019) — Spine Care

Home / Services

Our
Specializations

From neurological rehabilitation to acupuncture and chiropractic — comprehensive care tailored to your recovery.

What We Offer

Our Core
Specializations

🧠
Neuro Specialist
Service 01

Neurological
Physiotherapy

Specialized rehabilitation for stroke, Parkinson's, multiple sclerosis, spinal cord injuries and other neurological conditions. We use evidence-based techniques to restore motor function, balance, and coordination.

Our neurological physio program includes gait training, balance exercises, functional electrical stimulation, and cognitive rehabilitation for comprehensive recovery.

Stroke RecoveryParkinson'sMS ManagementBalance Training
🦴
Ortho Care
Service 02

Orthopaedic
Physiotherapy

Comprehensive treatment for bone, joint, and muscle conditions including fractures, arthritis, sports injuries, and post-surgical rehabilitation. We combine manual therapy with therapeutic exercises.

Our ortho programs include joint mobilization, soft tissue release, progressive strengthening, and functional training to get you back to your daily activities.

Joint PainArthritisSports InjuryPost-Surgery
👶
Child Care
Service 03

Paediatric
Physiotherapy

Gentle, specialized care for children with developmental delays, cerebral palsy, muscular dystrophy, and other pediatric conditions. We create a supportive, playful environment for young patients.

Our pediatric approach combines therapy with play-based activities to ensure children remain engaged while making significant progress in their motor development.

Cerebral PalsyDevelopmental DelayMotor SkillsNDT
🦴
Spine Expert
Service 04

Chiropractic
Care

Expert spinal adjustments and manipulations to treat back pain, neck pain, headaches, and posture problems. Our chiropractic care focuses on restoring proper alignment and nervous system function.

We combine chiropractic adjustments with soft tissue work and corrective exercises for long-lasting relief and prevention of recurring issues.

Spinal AdjustmentBack PainPostureHeadaches
✨
TCM Expert
Service 05

Acupuncture
Therapy

Traditional Chinese medicine technique using fine needles to stimulate specific points on the body. Effective for pain relief, stress reduction, and promoting natural healing.

Our acupuncture treatments are performed by trained specialists and can be combined with physiotherapy for enhanced results in pain management.

Pain ReliefStressDry NeedlingTrigger Points
💪
Paralysis Rehab
Service 06

Paralysis
Rehabilitation

Intensive physiotherapy and rehabilitation programs for patients with full or partial paralysis — focusing on restoring maximum possible function and independence.

Using neuromuscular re-education, electrical stimulation, and advanced manual therapy, we work tirelessly to help patients reclaim their quality of life.

HemiplegiaParaplegiaNerve Re-educationEMG Therapy
